primary_message: The proposed strategy creates strong business and sustainability upside with one dominant KPI and supporting proof.
body_goal: Prove the business value with one dominant KPI and a small set of supporting metrics.

body_structure.hero_block: Large KPI cluster in the left-center body.
support_blocks: Small supporting metric cards on the right
One short proof chart below the hero KPI
One quiet summary strip aligned with the supporting metrics
notes: Keep one business KPI visually dominant
Do not let the proof chart overpower the hero metric

when_to_use: Need one dominant business metric with supporting evidence
avoid_when: The message is primarily a process explanation
why_it_works: A single dominant KPI anchors the argument while smaller proof blocks add breadth without diluting the message.
adaptation_notes: Can swap the line chart for a bar chart if the time horizon is short
Limit supporting metrics to three or four
